name: videoedit
description: Forensic video inspection tool — single-file HTML with optional Android shell via Capacitor.

scripts.android:init: npm install @capacitor/core @capacitor/cli @capacitor/android && npx cap init VideoEdit com.tgpetrie.videoedit --web-dir . && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo APK at android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
